# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

- Runner type: Shared Runners
- Runner image: `ubuntu-latest`
- Runner tags: `gitlab-runner-shared`
- Pipeline commands: `bundle install; bundle exec rspec`
- Access token: The value should be provided as an environment variable.

The pipeline is available on [GitLab CI Shared Runners](https://gitlab.com/sushilb379/sample-project-for-gitlab-ci-sharedrunners) repository.
